note: Pre-registered Measure-Calibration battery. Each case fixes the mean-deviation inputs explicitly (demand/expenditure/marginalValue/appetite/budgetRemaining) so the battery measures the GATE's routing/thresholds deterministically, not the (separate, unproven) question of whether the derived signals track real-world temperance. Ground-truth 'optimal' is the measured move under Sophia's fail-closed boundary: proportionate|restrain|sustain|escalate. Quadrant labels: should_restrain = excess of expenditure with low marginal value; should_sustain = deficiency with high marginal value; proportionate = the mean; guard = akrasia or a protected required step.
